question: What is the couple doing in the image? Select from the following options: (A) Sitting on a bench under a cloudy sky. (B) Kissing in a field with the sun low in the sky. (C) Holding hands on a beach with waves in the background. (D) Dancing on a street with buildings in the background.
gold_answer: Kissing in a field with the sun low in the sky
answer_choices: Sitting on a bench under a cloudy sky
Kissing in a field with the sun low in the sky
Holding hands on a beach with waves in the background
Dancing on a street with buildings in the background
